questions.question: Explain the primary function of the Data Link Layer.
Describe the different DLC services, including framing, flow control, error control, and connectionless and connection-oriented services.
expectedPoints: Framing: dividing the data into smaller frames and adding a header and a trailer to each frame
Flow control: regulating the amount of data that can be sent by a device at a given time
Error control: detecting and correcting errors that occur during data transfer
Connectionless services: do not require an acknowledgement

questions.question: Explain the difference between connectionless and connection-oriented services.
expectedPoints: Connectionless services do not require an acknowledgement, while connection-oriented services do.

questions.question: Describe the purpose of the trailer in a data frame.
Explain the purpose of flow control in the Data Link Layer.
Describe the difference between HDLC and PPP.
expectedPoints: HDLC is a bit-oriented protocol, while PPP is a byte-oriented protocol.
